mapper.select: SELECT S.shipment_num, S.shipment_id, TO_CHAR(S.shipment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS shipment_date, S.shipment_status, S.plan_qty, E.ename, I.name, V.vender_name FROM shipment S JOIN emp E ON S.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN shipment_request SR ON S.shipment_request_num = SR.shipment_request_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num ORDER BY S.shipment_num DESC

SELECT S.shipment_num, S.shipment_id, TO_CHAR(S.shipment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS shipment_date, S.shipment_status, S.plan_qty, E.ename, I.name, V.vender_name FROM shipment S JOIN emp E ON S.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN shipment_request SR ON S.shipment_request_num = SR.shipment_request_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num WHERE 1 = 1
AND S.shipment_status = #{status}
AND ( upper(V.vender_name) LIKE '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%' OR upper(S.shipment_id) LIKE '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND S.shipment_date >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND S.shipment_date < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND S.shipment_date < SYSDATE + 1
ORDER BY S.shipment_num DESC
